blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,583 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
